api_token.description: Web Scraper Cloud API token. Sent as the api_token query parameter on every request; never logged.

base_url.description: Web Scraper Cloud API base URL override for tests or proxies.

sitemap_id_filter.description: Optional sitemap_id query parameter forwarded to the scraping_jobs_list stream, narrowing results to scraping jobs created from a single sitemap. Omitted entirely when unset (all scraping jobs are listed).

scraping_job_ids.description: Comma-, whitespace-, or semicolon-separated Web Scraper Cloud scraping job IDs to fan out over for the problematic_urls stream (one request per id). Required for that stream only.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
